name: Madeline 10x18 Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Storage Shed with Classic Charm & Elevated Function
open_features: A classic barn silhouette that increases vertical storage space-ideal for lofts, shelves, long-handled tools, and overhead organization.
Straightforward framing, clean design lines, and step-by-step instructions support first-time builders and experienced makers alike.
Rustic barn-style double doors make it easy to move in landscaping tools, bicycles, equipment, seasonal decor, or workshop materials.
Horizontal wood siding, white farmhouse trim, vintage sconces, and arched barn doors create a welcoming, heritage-inspired look.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Madeline Barn Shed Plan - a 10x18 beautifully crafted storage and workspace solution designed for efficiency, charm, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring a signature gambrel barn roof, warm wood siding, crisp white trim, and traditional double doors with transom windows, the Madeline blends nostalgic barn aesthetics with modern day practicality. Whether you're building a garden supply hub, DIY workshop, crafting getaway, or a dedicated out...
